evals.description: Skill generates complete per-slide speaker notes from a storyboard
evals.prompt: Write speaker notes for a 20-minute product roadmap presentation. Storyboard has 10 slides. Style: conversational. Slug: product-roadmap-2026.
assertions: Every slide in the storyboard has a corresponding notes section
Each section includes: timing, cue, script (2-4 sentences), key emphasis, transition phrase
Total script time is approximately 20 minutes (±10%)
The script is written as natural speech, not bullet points
The transition phrases connect logically to the next slide topic

evals.description: Skill generates a realistic Q&A section with probable questions and answers
evals.prompt: Add a Q&A section for a board presentation on Series A fundraising. Audience: VCs and board members.
assertions: The Q&A has 5-8 probable questions
Each question has a 2-4 sentence suggested answer
Questions about valuation, runway, and competitors are included
Sensitive questions (budget, headcount, risks) are flagged with ⚠️
Each question has a deflection phrase for out-of-scope answers

evals.description: Skill warns when a slide script exceeds its allocated duration
evals.prompt: Write speaker notes for this slide: 'Our competitive landscape analysis' — allocated 2 minutes, but the content is very dense with 6 competitors to cover.
assertions: The skill warns with ⏱️ that 6 competitors at 2 minutes is tight
The skill suggests trimming to 3-4 competitors or requesting more time
The generated script respects the 2-minute limit if the user confirms it
Word count is approximately 240 words (120 wpm × 2 min)

evals.description: Skill adapts script tone to the requested style
evals.prompt: Write speaker notes in formal style for a regulatory compliance presentation. Audience: government auditors.
assertions: The script uses formal register: no contractions, no colloquial phrases
Word pace estimate is ~100 wpm (formal pace)
Opening sentence is professional and direct
Transition phrases are formal (e.g., 'I will now turn to...' not 'So next up...')

evals.description: Skill includes a pre-presentation checklist in the output document
evals.prompt: Generate speaker notes for a conference keynote. Topic: future of remote work. 45 minutes.
assertions: The output document includes a pre-presentation checklist
The checklist includes at minimum: display test, clicker check, water, opening sentence memorized
The closing statement section is present
The total runtime header matches the storyboard duration (45 min)
